title: polycarpon tetraphyllum
intro: Polycarpon tetraphyllum, also known as four-leaf money plant or four-leaved polycarpon, is a small, annual herbaceous plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polycarpon tetraphyllum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
